params.name: Nuremberg Egg
params.description:
On Sept 27, 1510 AD, a locksmith in Nuremberg, Peter Henlein took eight years to create the world's first portable watch for the king.
The Nuremberg egg was the prototype of the modern pocket watch. This early pocket watch is completely handmade and egg-sized big that can easily fit into a pocket. The oddity is that the Nuremberg Egg does have a second hand mechanism on the inside without a second hand on the surface. This is because people at that time did not have a need for such precise ti …
